actionUnits.condition: XRGrabInteractable (MonoBehaviour id: 1135932914521357561, guid: 0ad34abafad169848a38072baa96cdb2) m_Activated has persistent calls to Gun.TriggerPulled(args) and Gun.Shoot(). To simulate controller activation without XR input, directly invoke Gun.Shoot() (MonoBehaviour id: 8183513503680063775, guid: d01186f01818ef24ead588d87fd2fea5). Expect a round to spawn at GunPov, AudioManager.Play('Gun Fire'), remainingAmmunition to decrement, and fire rate gating (1.5/s).

Force test of reload path regardless of ammo state. Gun.Reload() is public and parameterless. Expect text.SetText('Reloading'), AudioManager.Play('Reload'), and after reloadTime=2.5s remainingAmmunition resets to ammunition=10 and ShootState returns to Ready. After waiting, attempt to Shoot once to verify reload success.

XRGrabInteractable (MonoBehaviour id: 1135932914521357561, guid: 0ad34abafad169848a38072baa96cdb2) m_Activated has persistent calls to Gun.TriggerPulled(args) and Gun.Shoot(). To simulate controller activation without XR input, directly invoke Gun.Shoot() (MonoBehaviour id: 8183513503680063775, guid: d01186f01818ef24ead588d87fd2fea5). On success, prefab 'Laser' (prefab id: 6845118643277486568) is instantiated at GunPov with forward velocity roundSpeed=100, AudioManager.Play('Gun Fire') is called, remainingAmmunition decrements, and ShootState transitions to Shooting with nextShootTime=Time.time + 1/fireRate.

Validate fire-rate gating (fireRate=1.5 => ~0.667s between shots). After waiting >=0.667s, another Gun.Shoot() should succeed, instantiating another 'Laser' (prefab id: 6845118643277486568) and further decrementing remainingAmmunition.

Force test of reload path regardless of ammo state. Gun.Reload() is public and parameterless on MonoBehaviour id: 8183513503680063775. Expect text.SetText('Reloading') and AudioManager.Play('Reload'), then after reloadTime=2.5s remainingAmmunition resets to ammunition=10 and ShootState becomes Ready. After waiting, call Shoot once to verify reload success and instantiate 'Laser' (prefab id: 6845118643277486568).
